Transparency

Keep a full records history of your results after logging in

Staking perks

Investment made easy

What you can do with b-cube

Just select a bundle, connect your exchange and watch it trade and make profit on auto-pilot.

Access a curated selection of trading bundles created by experts

Introducing our expert selection of trading bundles. These bundles have been designed and tested by our team of traders, ensuring that they are able to perform consistently and profitably in the markets.

Additional Benefits

Why you should use b-cube

B-cube is the new generation platform for easy, secure, and fast AI driven automated trading.

Portfolio

Manage all your cryptocurrency accounts in one place

Portfolio

Manage all your cryptocurrency accounts in one place

Are you tired of managing multiple crypto accounts and keeping track of your investments? Look no further than a crypto portfolio management platform. Here, you can access AI-powered tools that will help you to automatically optimize and rebalance your portfolio all in one place.

  • Everything in one place
  • Manage multiple accounts
  • As many accounts as you want
Marketplace

Browse and rent our powerful AI trading strategies

Marketplace

Browse and rent our powerful AI trading strategies

Use AI-powered trading bundles that will work for you around the clock. Our bundles use advanced quant models and machine learning techniques to analyze market data and execute trades based on predefined strategies.

  • Invest in existing strategies
  • Create your own strategies (coming soon)
  • Monetize your custom strategies
Sentiment Analysis

Various indicators that tell you about the market trends

Sentiment Analysis

Various indicators that tell you about the market trends

Have an in-depth look at what traders feel about a particular coin. Our Sentiment Analysis indicator scans millions of social media posts about the market and shows how traders feel, think, trade.

  • Market sentiment
  • Trading insights
  • Trends
Simplicity

An intuitive and very easy to use trading application

Simplicity

An intuitive and very easy to use trading application

Whether you're new to trading or a seasoned pro, our app makes it easy for you to view your account information, and access valuable trading and analysis tools. You can trust that your personal and financial information is always safe and protected.

  • Clean and modern UI
  • Simple workflows
  • Personalized experience
Trade Tracking

Keep an eye on your trading transactions history

Trade Tracking

Keep an eye on your trading transactions history

Our app is the perfect solution for anyone looking to stay organized and on top of their trading activities. With a simple and easy-to-use interface, you can easily track your trade performance, view your account information, and access important market data and analysis.

  • Transaction history
  • Transaction insights
  • PnL history
Growth Tracking

Plan and forecast the results of your next investment

Growth Tracking

Plan and forecast the results of your next investment

Monitor the returns of your trading bundle and observe the performance of your investments over a period of time using our app. Additionally, you can optimize your investment strategy to achieve better results.

  • Growth history
  • Growth insights
  • Customization options
Non custodial

We do not keep or block your money. Withdraw anytime.

Non custodial

We do not keep or block your money. Withdraw anytime.

BCUBE is non-custodial, which means that we do not hold or store your money and assets. Instead, we provide you with the tools and features you need to manage and trade your efficiently directly on centralized exchanges.

  • We don't keep money
  • We don't keep funds
  • We don't keep assets
AI driven

AI trading technology backed by machine learning.

AI driven

AI trading technology backed by machine learning.

Our company's vision is to revolutionize the world of crypto investing by utilizing the power of AI technology. We believe that by harnessing the capabilities of AI, we can create a more efficient and profitable investment experience for our clients.

  • AI trading bundles
  • Machine learning algorithms
  • Continuous improvement
Create a Free Account

A FEW STEPS TO GET STARTED

How it works

Here is an overview of how the entire process works. It's free to start and scales as your profit grows.

Adam B.

Just joined b-cube

Free plan
$500 trading limit

Clarissa M.

Just joined b-cube

Basic+
$50,000 trading limit

Howard S.

Just joined b-cube

Premium+
Unlimited trading limit

Start your journey on our website by Signing Up for Free

Start by creating a free account, and start exploring the b-cube dashboard to get familiar with the platform. Once, you feel comfortable, explore the marketplace looking for a bundle.

Create a Free account

Connect your exchange accounts using your API keys

Use our Exchanges API to connect your accounts. Don’t fret, you’re almost there!

Create a Free account

Connect Exchange Account

Select provider

Binance

Bulls & Bears Altcoin

Binance

+ 1052 %

BTC Positional Spot Bundle

Binance

+ 109 %

Large Cap Fiat Out-performer Spot Bundle

Binance

+ 737.2 %

Mega Cap Trend following Spot Bundle

Binance

+ 145.8 %
Disclaimer: Performance of AI Crypto Bundles includes backtested performance along with the real trading performance

Choose a bundle that matches your goals

Trading is all about setting goals and sticking to them. Once your goals are set, you should be able to pick one of the available bundles that matches your strategy.

Create a Free account

Start a subscription, either with Fiat money or b-cube tokens

Your accounts are now connected. You know the platform a little bit more and you are ready to dive into more advanced trading. Choose one of the available plans, and either pay with fiat money or with BCUBE tokens.

Create a Free account

Sit back, relax and enjoy trading while your bundles handle your investments

Everything is up and running. You can now monitor your bundles and start tracking your returns, while slightly adujsting your strategy as the market evolves.

Create a Free account

Compare our plans

Our pricing helps you scale

Select the plan that works best for you among our offers. Scale up or down as needed as your profit grows.

Fiat payment
Freemium Basic Basic + Premium Premium +
Monthly fees 0€ /month 19€ /month 49€ /month 99€ /month 149€ /month
Max trading limit $500 $5,000 $50,000 $250,000 Unlimited
Number of free bundles included Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited
Switching between bundles
TA Screener 5€ /month 5€ /month
SAI Indicators (Coming soon) 5€ /month 5€ /month
Portfolio Management Tools
Risk Management Tool
Build your own AI Bundle (Coming soon)
Advanced level trading products
Earth (Tier 0) Mercury (Tier 1) Mars (Tier 2) Venus (Tier 3) Saturn (Tier 4) Jupiter (Tier 5)
Max trading limit Depends on Depends on Depends on Depends on Depends on Depends on
Required b-cube tokens for staking Zero 5,000 BCUBE 25,000 BCUBE 50,000 BCUBE 125,000 BCUBE 250,000 BCUBE
Discount on packs for staking $BCUBE token
(Payment in CC) 		0% 5% 15% 25% 35% 50%
Discount on packs for payment in $BCUBE tokens 15% 25% 35% 45% 60% 75%
Discount on 3rd party bundles for staking $BCUBE
(Payment in CC) 		0% 5% 10% 25% 35% 50%
Discount on 3rd party bundles for payment in $BCUBE tokens 0% 5% 10% 15% 20% 35%
Create a Free Account

They love B-Cube

Hear what they say

We have beginner and expert traders among our customers. They all agree on b-cube as the best AI trading platform.

  • This company does what it says on the tin. The service and the quality of the products are incredible but true. The B-Cube team and even the CEO himself patiently answered all of my questions and they are available 24/7 with advice and support, really great. B-Cube's business model is super innovative and will completely change the market, no monthly costs. The competition has to dress warmly.

    Denn!s

    This company does what it says on the…

  • Bcube is building a really promising stuff, but what really makes me trust so much in this project is the team behind, their transparency and honesty and the good vibes you can feel when you listen to the CEO, who is constantly giving information about what are they doing and why. I am sure this project will be huge in the future, the roadmap is brilliant, so I am glad to knew about it and get some $BCUBE tokens to enjoy its benefits, like for example trading bots, which are constantly improved with a tech behind that will make them outperform competition by far.

    Nor Ote Naiz

    Glad to find this promising project

  • This is the most efficient crypto trading bot I ever used. It is possible to choose between different bots and strategies, and all of them are super efficient. With the alt bot, I was able to significantly overperfom BTC growth during the bull run, something I couldn't have done personnally on a consistent basis -except if I had spent all my life doing due diligences. The customer service is excellent.

    Paul M

    This is the most efficient crypto…

  • I recently had the pleasure of using this service and I must say, I was thoroughly impressed! From start to finish, everything was seamless and efficient. The user interface was incredibly easy to navigate, allowing me to quickly find what I was looking for without any confusion or frustration. The range of options available to me was also impressive, giving me the freedom to choose the perfect solution for my needs.

    Danny Li

    I recently had the pleasure of using…

  • Best bot ever tried after using their services for nearly 3 months. I would recommended “Swing Trader Spot Bot (long only)” to everyone”. I love the CEO’s transparency and communication to community on Twitter. You guys rock!!!

    Kendra Mijatov

    Was great!

  • This company does what it says on the tin. The service and the quality of the products are incredible but true. The B-Cube team and even the CEO himself patiently answered all of my questions and they are available 24/7 with advice and support, really great. B-Cube's business model is super innovative and will completely change the market, no monthly costs. The competition has to dress warmly.
